title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD Methodology - Falling Behind
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: Inaugural Caterpillar 2022 Lobbying Report Highlights Political and Advocacy Efforts That Help Advance Enterprise Strategy
text: IRVING, Texas , Feb. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) has released The Purpose of Engagement, the company's first Lobbying Report. The inaugural report details how and why Caterpillar participates in the public policy process, advocating for a range of issues that advance the company's strategy and purpose while providing value to customers, shareholders, employees and other stakeholders.

title: Caterpillar Should Continue To Outperform
text: CAT's revenue should benefit from strong end markets, healthy backlog levels, and improvement in supply chain constraints. The margins should benefit from the higher price realization and moderation in higher input costs.

title: Caterpillar Announces Appointment of Two New Independent Directors
text: Judith Marks and James Fish, Jr. to Join the Board; Thanks to Edward Rust for Service IRVING, Texas , Feb. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) today announced that Judith (Judy) Marks, Chair, CEO and President of Otis Worldwide Corporation, and James (Jim) Fish, Jr., President and CEO of Waste Management (WM), have been appointed to the Caterpillar board of directors, effective March 1, 2023. Marks will serve on Caterpillar's Audit Committee and Compensation and Human Resources Committee.

title: Caterpillar Operates In An Expanding TAM
text: Caterpillar is a true dividend aristocrat, as the company has increased its dividend per share for many years. Despite headwinds such as supply chain constraints and inflationary pressures, Caterpillar's results were impressive, total revenue for fiscal year 2022 increased by 16.5% and adjusted EPS increased by 28%.

title: Caterpillar At A Premium But With Dividends, Infrastructure Tailwinds
text: Strong performance among the ME&T segments delivered solid results in Q4. Caterpillar's business should remain strong on the robust market position of the yellow products, infrastructure tailwinds, and decarbonization tilt.
